targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS Total_OF
FROM (
    SELECT CAST(REPLACE(unpivoted.OF_Num, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS OF_Nettoye,
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0 THEN o.OrderStepSequenceNum ELSE 0 END) = 990 THEN 'TERMINÉ'
        WHEN SUM(CASE 
            WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Fin), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.LastActivityTime) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
            WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN CASE WHEN GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Debut), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime), TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Fin), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
            ELSE CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Debut), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        END) > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD'
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN o.OrderStepSequenceNum ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'EN COURS'
        ELSE 'PLANIFIÉ'
    END AS Statut_Global
    FROM (
        SELECT `100` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début` AS Debut, `Heure Fin` AS Fin, 100 AS Op FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `100` != 'Libre' AND `100` IS NOT NULL AND `100` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `200` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 200 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `200` != 'Libre' AND `200` IS NOT NULL AND `200` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `300` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 300 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `300` != 'Libre' AND `300` IS NOT NULL AND `300` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `350` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 350 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `350` != 'Libre' AND `350` IS NOT NULL AND `350` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `400` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 400 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `400` != 'Libre' AND `400` IS NOT NULL AND `400` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `900` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 900 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `900` != 'Libre' AND `900` IS NOT NULL AND `900` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `990` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 990 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `990` != 'Libre' AND `990` IS NOT NULL AND `990` != ''
    ) unpivoted
    LEFT JOIN orderoperation o ON CAST(REPLACE(unpivoted.OF_Num, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) = CAST(o.OrderNum AS UNSIGNED) AND unpivoted.Op = o.OrderStepSequenceNum
    GROUP BY OF_Nettoye
) t;

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Statut_Global = 'EN RETARD' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OF_En_Retard
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CAST(REPLACE(unpivoted.OF_Num, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS OF_Nettoye,
        CASE 
            -- 1. Si la dernière opération (990) est terminée -> TERMINÉ
            WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0 THEN o.OrderStepSequenceNum ELSE 0 END) = 990 THEN 'TERMINÉ'
            
            -- 2. On calcule le retard total global (identique à ton tableau principal) et on vérifie s'il est > 0
            WHEN SUM(
              CASE 
                WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN 
                  ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Fin), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.LastActivityTime) / 60.0, 1)
                WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
                  ROUND(GREATEST(
                    TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Debut), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime),
                    TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Fin), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))
                  ) / 60.0, 1)
                ELSE 
                  ROUND(GREATEST(0, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Debut), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))) / 60.0, 1)
              END
            ) > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD'

            -- 3. Si ça a commencé mais pas de retard > 0
            WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN o.OrderStepSequenceNum ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'EN COURS'
            
            -- 4. Sinon
            ELSE 'PLANIFIÉ'
        END AS Statut_Global

    FROM (
        SELECT `100` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début` AS Debut, `Heure Fin` AS Fin, 100 AS Op FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `100` != 'Libre' AND `100` IS NOT NULL AND `100` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `200` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 200 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `200` != 'Libre' AND `200` IS NOT NULL AND `200` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `300` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 300 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `300` != 'Libre' AND `300` IS NOT NULL AND `300` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `350` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 350 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `350` != 'Libre' AND `350` IS NOT NULL AND `350` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `400` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 400 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `400` != 'Libre' AND `400` IS NOT NULL AND `400` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `900` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 900 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `900` != 'Libre' AND `900` IS NOT NULL AND `900` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `990` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 990 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `990` != 'Libre' AND `990` IS NOT NULL AND `990` != ''
    ) unpivoted
    LEFT JOIN orderoperation o ON CAST(REPLACE(unpivoted.OF_Num, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) = CAST(o.OrderNum AS UNSIGNED) AND unpivoted.Op = o.OrderStepSequenceNum
    GROUP BY OF_Nettoye
) t;

panels.title: OF en retard sur la ligne (${ligne})

targets.rawSql:
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN Statut_Global = 'TERMINÉ' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OF_Termines
FROM (
    SELECT CAST(REPLACE(unpivoted.OF_Num, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS OF_Nettoye,
    CASE 
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0 THEN o.OrderStepSequenceNum ELSE 0 END) = 990 THEN 'TERMINÉ'
        WHEN SUM(CASE 
            WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Fin), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.LastActivityTime) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
            WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN CASE WHEN GREATEST(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Debut), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime), TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Fin), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
            ELSE CASE WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Debut), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END
        END) > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD'
        WHEN MAX(CASE WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN o.OrderStepSequenceNum ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'EN COURS'
        ELSE 'PLANIFIÉ'
    END AS Statut_Global
    FROM (
        SELECT `100` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début` AS Debut, `Heure Fin` AS Fin, 100 AS Op FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `100` != 'Libre' AND `100` IS NOT NULL AND `100` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `200` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 200 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `200` != 'Libre' AND `200` IS NOT NULL AND `200` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `300` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 300 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `300` != 'Libre' AND `300` IS NOT NULL AND `300` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `350` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 350 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `350` != 'Libre' AND `350` IS NOT NULL AND `350` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `400` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 400 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `400` != 'Libre' AND `400` IS NOT NULL AND `400` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `900` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 900 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `900` != 'Libre' AND `900` IS NOT NULL AND `900` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `990` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 990 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `990` != 'Libre' AND `990` IS NOT NULL AND `990` != ''
    ) unpivoted
    LEFT JOIN orderoperation o ON CAST(REPLACE(unpivoted.OF_Num, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) = CAST(o.OrderNum AS UNSIGNED) AND unpivoted.Op = o.OrderStepSequenceNum
    GROUP BY OF_Nettoye
) t;

SELECT 
    OF_Nettoye,
    Derniere_Op_Terminee,
    Retard_Global_Accumule,
    -- La logique du statut devient ultra simple et lisible
    CASE 
        WHEN Derniere_Op_Terminee = 990 THEN 'TERMINÉ'
        WHEN Retard_Global_Accumule > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD'
        WHEN Max_Op_Commencee > 0 THEN 'EN COURS'
        ELSE 'PLANIFIÉ'
    END AS Statut_Global
FROM (
    SELECT 
        CAST(REPLACE(unpivoted.OF_Num, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS OF_Nettoye,
        MAX(CASE WHEN o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0 THEN o.OrderStepSequenceNum ELSE 0 END) AS Derniere_Op_Terminee,
        MAX(CASE WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN o.OrderStepSequenceNum ELSE 0 END) AS Max_Op_Commencee,
        
        -- L'ASTUCE EST ICI : On extrait uniquement le calcul de l'opération la plus avancée
        CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(GROUP_CONCAT(
            CASE 
                WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN 
                    ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Fin), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.LastActivityTime) / 60.0, 1)
                WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
                    ROUND(GREATEST(
                        TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Debut), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime),
                        TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Fin), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))
                    ) / 60.0, 1)
                ELSE 
                    ROUND(GREATEST(0, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', unpivoted.Debut), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))) / 60.0, 1)
            END
            ORDER BY 
                -- On trie pour mettre l'opération en cours la plus élevée en premier (ex: la 300 en premier)
                -- Si rien n'a commencé, on met l'opération la plus petite en premier (la 100)
                CASE WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN o.OrderStepSequenceNum ELSE 0 END DESC, 
                unpivoted.Op ASC
        ), ',', 1) AS DECIMAL(10,1)) AS Retard_Global_Accumule
        
    FROM (
        SELECT `100` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début` AS Debut, `Heure Fin` AS Fin, 100 AS Op FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `100` != 'Libre' AND `100` IS NOT NULL AND `100` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `200` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 200 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `200` != 'Libre' AND `200` IS NOT NULL AND `200` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `300` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 300 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `300` != 'Libre' AND `300` IS NOT NULL AND `300` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `350` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 350 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `350` != 'Libre' AND `350` IS NOT NULL AND `350` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `400` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 400 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `400` != 'Libre' AND `400` IS NOT NULL AND `400` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `900` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 900 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `900` != 'Libre' AND `900` IS NOT NULL AND `900` != '' UNION ALL
        SELECT `990` AS OF_Num, `Heure Début`, `Heure Fin`, 990 FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana WHERE `990` != 'Libre' AND `990` IS NOT NULL AND `990` != ''
    ) unpivoted
    LEFT JOIN orderoperation o ON CAST(REPLACE(unpivoted.OF_Num, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) = CAST(o.OrderNum AS UNSIGNED) AND unpivoted.Op = o.OrderStepSequenceNum
    GROUP BY OF_Nettoye
) base
ORDER BY 
    CASE WHEN Statut_Global = 'EN RETARD' THEN 1 WHEN Statut_Global = 'EN COURS' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END,
    Retard_Global_Accumule DESC

SELECT 
  CAST(REPLACE(p.`100`, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS OF_Num,
  p.`Heure Début` AS Debut_Theo, 
  o.FirstActivityTime AS Debut_Reel,
  p.`Heure Fin` AS Fin_Theo,
  o.LastActivityTime AS Fin_Reelle,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, o.LastActivityTime) / 60.0 - 7.0, 1)
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) / 60.0 - 7.0, 1)
    ELSE 0 
  END AS Retard_sur_OP,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Fin`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.LastActivityTime) / 60.0, 1)
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      ROUND(GREATEST(
        TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime),
        TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Fin`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))
      ) / 60.0, 1)
    ELSE 
      ROUND(GREATEST(0, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))) / 60.0, 1)
  END AS Retard_Total,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) THEN 
      'TERMINÉ'
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      CASE 
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) > 7*60 THEN 'EN RETARD (OP > 7h)'
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime) > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD (DÉMARRAGE)'
        ELSE 'EN COURS' 
      END
    ELSE 
      CASE 
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD (NON DÉMARRÉ)'
        ELSE 'PLANIFIÉ' 
      END
  END AS Statut
  
FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana p
LEFT JOIN orderoperation o ON CAST(REPLACE(p.`100`, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) = CAST(o.OrderNum AS UNSIGNED) AND o.OrderStepSequenceNum = 100
WHERE p.`100` != 'Libre' AND p.`100` IS NOT NULL AND p.`100` != ''

SELECT 
  CAST(REPLACE(p.`200`, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS OF_Num,
  p.`Heure Début` AS Debut_Theo, 
  o.FirstActivityTime AS Debut_Reel,
  p.`Heure Fin` AS Fin_Theo,
  o.LastActivityTime AS Fin_Reelle,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, o.LastActivityTime) / 60.0 - 7.0, 1)
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) / 60.0 - 7.0, 1)
    ELSE 0 
  END AS Retard_sur_OP,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Fin`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.LastActivityTime) / 60.0, 1)
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      ROUND(GREATEST(
        TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime),
        TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Fin`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))
      ) / 60.0, 1)
    ELSE 
      ROUND(GREATEST(0, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))) / 60.0, 1)
  END AS Retard_Total,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) THEN 
      'TERMINÉ'
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      CASE 
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) > 7*60 THEN 'EN RETARD (OP > 7h)'
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime) > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD (DÉMARRAGE)'
        ELSE 'EN COURS' 
      END
    ELSE 
      CASE 
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD (NON DÉMARRÉ)'
        ELSE 'PLANIFIÉ' 
      END
  END AS Statut
  
FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana p
LEFT JOIN orderoperation o ON CAST(REPLACE(p.`200`, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) = CAST(o.OrderNum AS UNSIGNED) AND o.OrderStepSequenceNum = 200
WHERE p.`200` != 'Libre' AND p.`200` IS NOT NULL AND p.`200` != ''

SELECT 
  CAST(REPLACE(p.`300`, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS OF_Num,
  p.`Heure Début` AS Debut_Theo, 
  o.FirstActivityTime AS Debut_Reel,
  p.`Heure Fin` AS Fin_Theo,
  o.LastActivityTime AS Fin_Reelle,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, o.LastActivityTime) / 60.0 - 7.0, 1)
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) / 60.0 - 7.0, 1)
    ELSE 0 
  END AS Retard_sur_OP,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Fin`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.LastActivityTime) / 60.0, 1)
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      ROUND(GREATEST(
        TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime),
        TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Fin`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))
      ) / 60.0, 1)
    ELSE 
      ROUND(GREATEST(0, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))) / 60.0, 1)
  END AS Retard_Total,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) THEN 
      'TERMINÉ'
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      CASE 
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) > 7*60 THEN 'EN RETARD (OP > 7h)'
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime) > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD (DÉMARRAGE)'
        ELSE 'EN COURS' 
      END
    ELSE 
      CASE 
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD (NON DÉMARRÉ)'
        ELSE 'PLANIFIÉ' 
      END
  END AS Statut
  
FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana p
LEFT JOIN orderoperation o ON CAST(REPLACE(p.`300`, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) = CAST(o.OrderNum AS UNSIGNED) AND o.OrderStepSequenceNum = 300
WHERE p.`300` != 'Libre' AND p.`300` IS NOT NULL AND p.`300` != ''

SELECT 
  CAST(REPLACE(p.`350`, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS OF_Num,
  p.`Heure Début` AS Debut_Theo, 
  o.FirstActivityTime AS Debut_Reel,
  p.`Heure Fin` AS Fin_Theo,
  o.LastActivityTime AS Fin_Reelle,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, o.LastActivityTime) / 60.0 - 7.0, 1)
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) / 60.0 - 7.0, 1)
    ELSE 0 
  END AS Retard_sur_OP,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) AND o.LastActivityTime IS NOT NULL THEN 
      ROUND(TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Fin`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.LastActivityTime) / 60.0, 1)
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      ROUND(GREATEST(
        TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime),
        TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Fin`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))
      ) / 60.0, 1)
    ELSE 
      ROUND(GREATEST(0, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'))) / 60.0, 1)
  END AS Retard_Total,
  
  CASE 
    WHEN (o.Status IN ('Complete', 'Completed', 'C', 'F') OR o.QtyGood > 0) THEN 
      'TERMINÉ'
    WHEN o.FirstActivityTime IS NOT NULL AND o.FirstActivityTime != '' THEN 
      CASE 
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, o.FirstActivityTime, STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) > 7*60 THEN 'EN RETARD (OP > 7h)'
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), o.FirstActivityTime) > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD (DÉMARRAGE)'
        ELSE 'EN COURS' 
      END
    ELSE 
      CASE 
        WHEN TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT('2026/', p.`Heure Début`), '%Y/%d/%m %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE('${date_ref}', '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')) > 0 THEN 'EN RETARD (NON DÉMARRÉ)'
        ELSE 'PLANIFIÉ' 
      END
  END AS Statut
  
FROM planning_${ligne}_grafana p
LEFT JOIN orderoperation o ON CAST(REPLACE(p.`350`, '.0', '') AS UNSIGNED) = CAST(o.OrderNum AS UNSIGNED) AND o.OrderStepSequenceNum = 350
WHERE p.`350` != 'Libre' AND p.`350` IS NOT NULL AND p.`350` != ''
